raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhtija tas KUNGS
Jerub-Baalu/ un Bedanu/ un
Jewtu/ un Samuelu/ un iglah-
be juhs no juhsu Eenatdneeku Rohkas wifsapkahrt/ ta ka juhs
ar Meernu dsthwojat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu juhs redsejat/ ka
Näis to Ammona Behrnu
Kehninsch prett jums nahze/ tad
fazzijat juhs us man: Ne/ bet
weenam Kehnizam buhs pahr
mums waldiht/ kur tomehr tas
KUNGS juhtu Deews juhsu
Kehninsch bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu raugi/ te irr tas
Kehninsch/ ko juhs effat ismeklej-
schi/ ko juhs effat praffijschi/ un
redsi/tas KUNGS irr pahr jums
weenu Kehnizm eezeblis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ja juhs to KUNGU bih-
stefeetees/ un winnam kalpojeet/
un winna Balkfuei klausfiscet/
un tat KUNGA Muttei pretti
ne turrefeetees/ tad tik labbi juhs/
ka ir tas Kehninsch/ kas pahr
juhs walda/ tam KUNGAM
juhtu Deewam pakkat staigafeet:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja juhs ta KUNGA
Balkfnet ne klausfieet/ un tat
KUNGA Muttei prettiturrefee-
tees/ tad buhs ta KUNGA Roh-
ka prett jums/ tik labbi ka prett
juhsiem Tehweem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir stahjeetes tagadschei-
tan/ un rangajt scho leetu Leetu/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Neggi tagad irr t
Kweetschu ptawjamajs Laiks? E-
peefaufschu to KUNGU/ kata-
buhs doht Behrkoxus un Leetus
ka juhs atsishstat un redsat juhs
Launumu leelu effam/ ko juhs
effat darrijscht preeksch ta KUN-
GA Azzim/ weenu Kehnizm pal-
jums luhydamit:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu Samuels to KUN-
GU peetauze/ tad dewe ta
KUNGS Behrkoxus un Leetu
tai pascha Deewa/ tad bihjajah
wiſti Laudis to KUNGU toi-
ti un Samuelu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſti Laudis fazzij-
us Samuels: Luhdspreeksch ta-
weeni Kalpeem to KUNGU ta-
wu Deewu/ ka mehs ne mirstan-
pabri pahr wiſfeem muhfee-
Grehkeem effam mehs arri-
Lannu darrijschi/ ka mehs fewi-
effam weenu Kehnizm luhygufch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Samuels u-
teem Laudim: Ne bihsteetees
juhs gann effat wiſtu scho La-
un darrijscht/ tomehr ne atkah-
jeetees no ta KUNGA/ bet ko-
pojeet tam KUNGAM ar wi-
fawn Girdi:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ne atkahpjeetees/ z-
tadi ka juhs buhtut Neleetibah-
pakkat staigajschti/ kas Leeti-
derr/ nedg igslahbj/ bet irr D-
leetiba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS ne a-
stahs fawus Laudis fawa lee-
Wahrda deht/ tapehz ka t-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
